unanimous_blockers: T13 (file_count_max=14) НЕ помечен challenge-gate несмотря на operator-loop правило 'risk_tier ∈ {db_migration, security} OR file_count_max > 5'. Применение rule буквально → 13/15 packets fire challenge, plan + manifest list только 4. ENG + ARCHITECT raised. Fix: либо wave-spec override clause (e.g. 'AND risk_tier ≥ strong_gate'), либо reduce file_count_max на T01/T02/T05/T06/T10/T13/T15, либо добавить exempted-packets list.

Strategic checkpoint cross-file расхождение: mvp-0.md § 5+§ 7+§ 9 говорят 'после T03/T06/T09/T12' (=3/6/9/12 per STRATEGIC_REVIEW_EVERY=3 counter); mvp-0-packets.md § 5 говорит 'после T03/T07/T10/T13'. ENG + ARCHITECT raised. Per operator-loop semantics counter-based 3/6/9/12 correct — packets manifest § 5 содержит numerically wrong claim.

Critical-path bottleneck T09 (deps T07+T08, оба ≠trivial). CEO + ENG raised. T08 db_migration challenge-gate ~3 rounds typical → T09 blocked даже когда T07 ready. CEO interprets как 'wave не завершится к defense'; ENG interprets как 'wall increases wave time 2x'. Single-threaded 10-hop critical path остаётся.

Numerical inconsistencies в обоих files: '9 ordinary / 4 strong_gate / 2 db_migration' — actual count 8/5/2 (sum 15 ✓ но cuts wrong). '8 architect calls' но manifest Architect=да на 7 packets. Also '11 ordinary-tier Sonnet calls' wrong per operator-loop model dispatch (strong+db → Opus = 7 Opus + 8 Sonnet). ARCHITECT raised (ENG separately noted).

Wave spec § 12 'Open decisions blocking wave init' (12.1-12.8) outdated — ADR-022..028 уже приняты в 04-technical-decisions.md (bun, Android SDK, Result manual, tests location, flat layout, Capacitor SQLite, web memory-only). Section должен быть resolved/closed. ARCHITECT raised.

conflicts.topic: wave scope: shrink 15→5-8 packets + killer feature vs keep 15 + fix tech blockers
conflicts.ceo_says: Drop T04/T05/T06/T07/T10/T14/T15. 10 packets infrastructure pure → throw-away risk высокий. Keep ~8 + add T-new (OCR syllabus / AI daily triage / voice quick-capture) для distinctive defense story. Ambition=3/10.
conflicts.eng_says: 15 packets keep. Tighten within-scope: add T02→T08 dep (Capacitor plugin install requires platform), document migration down path, calibrate health weights, fix HEALTH_TIMEOUT_CAP, lock idempotency contract (no-op vs error Result), explicit single-TX migration wrap.

conflicts.topic: gamification scope (XP формула strong_gate worth it?)
conflicts.ceo_says: T05 (XP strong_gate + architect + critic) over-engineered для формулы floor(xp/1000)+1 без motivational loop (drops/mascot/rewards в MVP-1). Дипломная новизна=0. Drop T05.
conflicts.architect_says: T05 layer placement correct, watchlist § 13 #3 (level formula) hard-MVP-0 invariant — boundary tests xpTotal=0/999/1000/1001 must pass. Fix typo в 07 § 5 worked example (computeProgress dup), keep T05 strong_gate.

ceo.scope_gap: Plan ships hexagonal scaffold + CRUD todo + trivial XP формула. Claims 'working core' но real user value = generic todo + прогресс-бар. 10+ из 15 packets — pure infrastructure. User-facing logic = T13/T14 (18 files).
ceo.ten_star_idea: Pick ONE specific student pain (например 'дедлайны курсачей теряются между Telegram/тетрадь/память') и build narrow killer feature: photo-of-syllabus → OCR → auto-tasks + один agentic loop 'что из 5 задач реально сегодня?' Hexagonal arch демонстрируется на одном вертикальном slice глубоко.
ceo.narrowest_wedge: 5 packets вместо 15: scaffold, SQLite+migration+TaskRepo, create/list/complete usecase + memory, UI minimal, Android deploy. Profile/XP/archive/groups/ordered-tree → MVP-1.
